name: ACCREDITED_MEMBER
description: Accredited member role. Can create emission records and submit them for verification.

name: UNACCREDITED_MEMBER
description: Unaccredited member role. Can create emission records but cannot submit them for verification.

name: GUEST
description: Guest role. Only can read the organization and its data.

name: VERIFIER
description: Verifier role. Can read the organization and its data and suggest changes to the emission records.

name: CONSULTANT
description: Consultant role. Can read and modify the organization and its data.
